linting.notes: No linter configuration found. No ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy, or black configuration in pyproject.toml or standalone config files.

env_vars: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY - Required by main.py for Claude Agent SDK (not needed for tests)
testing.notes: Only one test file exists: scripts/test_version_regex.py. It is a standalone Python script that tests regex patterns, not using pytest or unittest. The test uses simple assertions and exit(1) on failure. No formal test framework is configured. The main application (main.py) is a Claude agent orchestration tool that requires a .env file with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to run, but the test does not require this.

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration found. No .github/workflows/, no Jenkinsfile, no Tekton pipelines, no pre-commit hooks.

build.notes: Python 3.13+ project using UV package manager. Dependencies: claude-agent-sdk (0.1.48), pyyaml (6.0.3), python-dotenv. The main application orchestrates Claude agents to generate architecture documentation from repository source code. No build step is required; this is a pure Python application.

conventions.test_naming: Simple standalone scripts with hardcoded test cases
conventions.notes: Project structure: main.py is entry point, lib/ contains modules (agent_runner.py, build_info.py, cli.py, fetch.py, kustomize_context.py, manifest_parser.py, phases.py), scripts/ contains utilities and the single test file. Code appears to follow standard Python conventions but has no enforced linting or formatting configuration.

test_commands.notes: Exit code 0. All 15 test cases passed. Tests regex pattern for parsing VERSION lines from Makefiles.

container_recipe.notes: The container setup is straightforward. UV creates a .venv automatically during 'uv sync'. Tests can run with system Python or with .venv/bin/python (both work). No system dependencies beyond base Python 3.13 image are required. The main application requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env file, but the test suite does not.
